mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ATTENDANCE (ATTENDANCE_SEQ, USERS_ID, WORK_DATE, CHECK_IN) VALUES (ATTENDANCE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{users_id}, TRUNC(SYSDATE), SYSTIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE ATTENDANCE SET CHECK_OUT = SYSTIMESTAMP, TOTAL_WORK_MIN = ROUND( (CAST(SYSTIMESTAMP AS DATE) - CAST(CHECK_IN AS DATE)) * 24 * 60 ) WHERE USERS_ID = #{users_id} AND WORK_DATE = TRUNC(SYSDATE)

UPDATE ATTENDANCE A SET CHECK_IN = CASE WHEN A.CHECK_IN IS NULL THEN CASE
WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM VAC V JOIN DOCUMENT D ON V.DOC_SEQ = D.DOC_SEQ WHERE D.USERS_ID = A.USERS_ID AND A.WORK_DATE BETWEEN V.START_DATE AND V.END_DATE AND V.VAC_TYPE = '오전반차' AND D.STATUS = '승인' ) THEN TRUNC(A.WORK_DATE) + 13/24 ELSE TRUNC(A.WORK_DATE) + 9/24 END ELSE A.CHECK_IN END, CHECK_OUT = CASE
WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM VAC V JOIN DOCUMENT D ON V.DOC_SEQ = D.DOC_SEQ WHERE D.USERS_ID = A.USERS_ID AND A.WORK_DATE BETWEEN V.START_DATE AND V.END_DATE AND V.VAC_TYPE = '오후반차' AND D.STATUS = '승인' ) THEN TRUNC(A.WORK_DATE) + 13/24 ELSE TRUNC(A.WORK_DATE) + 18/24 END, TOTAL_WORK_MIN = CASE
WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM VAC V JOIN DOCUMENT D ON V.DOC_SEQ = D.DOC_SEQ WHERE D.USERS_ID = A.USERS_ID AND A.WORK_DATE BETWEEN V.START_DATE AND V.END_DATE AND V.VAC_TYPE = '오후반차' AND D.STATUS = '승인' ) THEN 240 ELSE 480 END WHERE A.WORK_DATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND (A.CHECK_IN IS NULL OR A.CHECK_OUT IS NULL)
mapper.select: SELECT CHECK_IN, CHECK_OUT FROM ATTENDANCE WHERE USERS_ID = #{users_id} AND WORK_DATE = TRUNC(SYSDATE)

SELECT COUNT(*) AS work_days, ROUND(SUM(TOTAL_WORK_MIN) / 60, 1) AS total_hours, SUM(CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(CHECK_IN, 'HH24:MI') > '09:00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS late_cnt FROM ATTENDANCE WHERE USERS_ID = #{loginId} AND TO_CHAR(WORK_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM')

SELECT COUNT(*) AS work_days, SUM(CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(CHECK_IN, 'HH24:MI') > '09:00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS late_cnt, ROUND(SUM(TOTAL_WORK_MIN) / 60, 1) AS overtime_hours FROM ATTENDANCE WHERE USERS_ID = #{loginId} AND WORK_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') AND WORK_DATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') + 7
